ddls:
CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "experiment_name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the experiment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for experiment creation */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for experiment update */,
  "experiment_type" TEXT /* Type of the experiment (e.g., visual perception, auditory memory) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant */,
  "participant_name" TEXT /* Full name of the participant */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the participant */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the participant (e.g., researcher, subject) */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the participant */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the participant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trials" (
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trial */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the trial belongs to */,
  "trial_name" TEXT /* Name of the trial */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the trial */,
  "trial_type" TEXT /* Type of the trial (e.g., training, testing) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trials_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stimuli" (
  "stimulus_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stimulus */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trial the stimulus belongs to */,
  "stimulus_name" TEXT /* Name of the stimulus */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the stimulus */,
  "stimulus_type" TEXT /* Type of the stimulus (e.g., visual, auditory) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stimulus_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stimuli_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES trials ("trial_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "responses" (
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each response */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant who made the response */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trial the response belongs to */,
  "response_time" REAL /* Time taken by the participant to make the response */,
  "accuracy" INTEGER /* Whether the response was accurate or not */,
  "response_type" TEXT /* Type of the response (e.g., correct, incorrect) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES trials ("trial_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reversals" (
  "reversal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reversal */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trial the reversal belongs to */,
  "reversal_name" TEXT /* Name of the reversal */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the reversal */,
  "reversal_type" TEXT /* Type of the reversal (e.g., visual, auditory) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reversal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reversals_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES trials ("trial_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "levels" (
  "level_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each level */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trial the level belongs to */,
  "level_name" TEXT /* Name of the level */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the level */,
  "level_type" TEXT /* Type of the level (e.g., easy, hard) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("level_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_levels_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES trials ("trial_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "training_types" (
  "training_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each training type */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trial the training type belongs to */,
  "training_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the training type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the training type */,
  "training_type_category" TEXT /* Category of the training type (e.g., visual, auditory) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("training_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_types_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES trials ("trial_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "soas" (
  "soa_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each SOA */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trial the SOA belongs to */,
  "soa_value" INTEGER /* Value of the SOA */,
  "soa_type" TEXT /* Type of the SOA (e.g., short, long) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("soa_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_soas_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES trials ("trial_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fixation_times" (
  "fixation_time_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fixation time */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trial the fixation time belongs to */,
  "fixation_time" INTEGER /* Value of the fixation time */,
  "fixation_type" TEXT /* Type of the fixation time (e.g., short, long) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fixation_time_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fixation_times_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES trials ("trial_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movement_times" (
  "movement_time_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each movement time */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trial the movement time belongs to */,
  "movement_time" INTEGER /* Value of the movement time */,
  "movement_type" TEXT /* Type of the movement time (e.g., fast, slow) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movement_time_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movement_times_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES trials ("trial_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant who made the rating */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trial the rating belongs to */,
  "rating" REAL /* Value of the rating */,
  "rating_type" TEXT /* Type of the rating (e.g., subjective, objective) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES trials ("trial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "latencies" (
  "latency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each latency */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trial the latency belongs to */,
  "latency" REAL /* Value of the latency */,
  "latency_type" TEXT /* Type of the latency (e.g., short, long) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("latency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_latencies_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES trials ("trial_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_experiments" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level of the user for the experiment (e.g., read-only, edit) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "visualizations" (
  "visualization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visualization */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the visualization belongs to */,
  "visualization_type" TEXT /* Type of the visualization (e.g., bar chart, line graph) */,
  "data" TEXT /* Data used to generate the visualization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visualization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visualizations_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)
